headline: FedEx Freight Starts Trading Today. It Has Potential.
summary: Instead, FedEx’s spinoff—FedEx Freight trades under the symbol FDXF—is complete.  FedEx was at $333 in late-morning trading, down about 1% from its Friday close north of $411.  FedEx Freight shares were trading for $164, up about 2.5% from its late Friday price of about $160.
